programmes.show_description: All Enemies, Foreign and Domestic: The police shut down Chinatown as they hunt for a killer. Meanwhile, the Hop Wei make a major move. (S2, ep 8)
Documentary series following one of the UK's largest police forces, Greater Manchester Police, as they tackle crime and battle to keep the streets safe.
Devon/Cornwall: Adrenaline-fuelled documentary following Britain's police. This week's fix sees them tackling robbers, prostitutes and speed merchants in the West Country. (S1, ep 6)
Documentary series following Australia's traffic enforcers. Officers face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers. (S11, ep 8)
New Zealand reality series following the work of customs officers as they prevent drug smuggling, illegal immigrants and more. (S9, ep 1)

Documentary series from New Zealand following the madness and mayhem faced by intrepid officers as they pull over motorists for a variety of suspected offences. (S15, ep 3)

At Detroit Metro Airport, a pregnant Chinese national has CBP asking questions and a security breach on the tarmac leads officers to a jet bound for Haiti. (S1, ep 20)
A Canadian is interviewed under oath after CBP discovers pictures of pot plants on his phone. Without paperwork, it could be curtains for a Venezuelan conductor. (S1, ep 21)

In Chicago, officers find some questionable medicine, hikers get into trouble and an architect's story seems suspicious. (S1, ep 11)
Outbound officers search for a fugitive in Washington State and a Vegas-bound Dutch cook is grilled in secondary at Detroit Metro Airport. (S1, ep 12)

Cardassian: A young Cardassian, orphaned in the war and raised by Bajorans, causes turmoil on the station when his people attempt to reclaim him.
The Other Side: SG-1 responds to a plea for help from a civilisation that has traced its roots back to Earth. (S4, ep 2)
Prophecy: Voyager encounters a group of nomadic Klingons aboard a generational ship, who are convinced that Tom and B'Elanna's unborn child is their saviour. (S7, ep 14)
The Last Outpost: The away teams of the USS Enterprise and Ferengi starships face an inquisition by a mysterious life form as they are held captive at an unknown planet.
The Chase Continues: Danny, Connor and Abby must pursue Helen Cutter through a series of anomalies in order to stop her from wiping out humanity's ancestors. Season finale. (S3, ep 10)
Why We Fight: Easy Company find an abandoned concentration camp. While helping the survivors and burying the dead, news comes of Hitler's suicide. (9 of 10)
Points: The soldiers celebrate the end of the war, but their joy is short-lived as they learn not everyone has enough service points to be sent home. Contains flashing images. (10 of 10)
The End: Nick faces off against a seemingly unstoppable enemy in this final episode of the fantasy drama. (S6, ep 13)
Enter The Dragon: Enemies forge alliances for self-protection as Chinatown descends into a brutally violent race war. (S2, ep 9)
Documentary series following one of the UK's largest police forces, Greater Manchester Police, as they tackle crime and battle to keep the streets safe.
Officers in West Wales attend a street fight outside a nightclub, before their colleagues from the drugs squad launch a raid. (S1, ep 8)

Airside at JFK Airport, officers rush to inspect some high-maintenance passengers and a mother and son are suspected of money structuring in Detroit. (S1, ep 7)
An inside smuggling job is suspected at JFK Airport. Food couriers could be carriers and in Detroit, a wrong turn separates some buds. (S1, ep 8)
A frequent visitor of drug source countries is questioned in New York and a Canadian cowboy may be a mule. (S1, ep 9)
A bus passenger presents curious concoctions at JFK Airport and a Chicago canine sniffs out a stash of cash. (S1, ep 10)
A robber gets a taste of martial arts expertise when he targets the wrong shopkeeper. Three burglars are delighted to stumble upon an unguarded safe. (S6, ep 14)
A thief has his eye on an impossible prize, while another burglar bags himself a starring role in a catch-a-thief campaign. (S6, ep 15)
A look at the clever new methods the police and public are using to catch criminals. (S7, ep 1)
Jump in as we witness icy escapades, heart-warming animal rescues and the wrath of ancient Nordic gods against motorcyclists. (S3, ep 7)
We bring you action packed rescues, not-so smooth criminals, and some of the most extraordinary and downright spooky moments ever caught on film. (S3, ep 8)
It's the one we've all been waiting for. Emotions run high as the cast of Friends take one last trip to Central Perk to reminisce and relive moments from the iconic sitcom.
A new season of the insightful documentary following the daily dramas of caring for cheeky primates at the Monkey World Ape Rescue Centre. (S17, ep 5)
A new season of the insightful documentary following the daily dramas of caring for cheeky primates at the Monkey World Ape Rescue Centre. (S17, ep 6)
As the lockdown eases, people start to return to Victoria Falls, and the Zambia gang have plenty of opportunity to perfect their ambushing techniques. (S1, ep 3)
Wild Swaziland: Swaziland is one of Africa's smallest countries, but its wildlife rivals anywhere on Earth. See how the 'Big Five' and 132 mammal species have made it their home. (S1, ep 4)
Witness joyous births, shattering deaths and battles galore as the Waterfront Pride fights to maintain control over the banks of Botswana's Chobe River. (1 of 5)
Get ready for more thrills and spills in a brand-new episode of Caught on Dashcam. (S6, ep 6)
Movie producers Robert De Niro and Zach Braff attempt to set up aging actor Tommy Lee Jones in an insurance scam. Comedy with Morgan Freeman. (2020)
A new season of Caught On Dashcam! From crazy weather to shocking road rage and the answer to why the chicken crossed the road, all caught on camera! (S5, ep 1)
